claim_text: The patient has abdominal pain.
The patient has had pain for one week.
The patient's pain is gradually increasing.
The patient has nausea and vomiting on and off.
The patient's coffee intake increased in the past week.
The patient has a history of Type 2 diabetes.
The patient has a history of asthma.
The patient has nausea.
The patient has vomiting.
The patient has diarrhea.
The patient is taking metformin.
The patient is taking flovent.
The patient is taking albuterol.
The patient has mild tenderness in the epigastrium.
The patient's heart exam is unremarkable.
The patient's lung exam is normal.
The patient has Acute Gastritis.
The patient's caffeine and alcohol intake may be contributing to Acute Gastritis.
The patient's metformin dose should be adjusted to 1000mg in the morning and 500mg in the evening.
The patient should continue taking flovent.
The patient should use albuterol as needed.
The patient should cut back on caffeine.
The patient should cut back on alcohol.
The patient should reduce spicy food intake.
The patient should follow up in four weeks.
The patient has been prescribed Zantac for twice daily use.
